creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
I'm very new here to decide :) Let it be up to you or to the maintainer…

Thank you for pointing to "PORTBUILD_USER=root" setting, as I don't have it set explicitly, but poudriere itself use this internally when CCACHE_DIR is set and CCACHE_DIR_NON_ROOT_SAFE is not set (just what I have for now, may need to fine tune, or better leave it as is to detect such issues under root?)
